news.headline: Highwire receives extension from SPAR Group for acquisition financing, with new termination date on March 17, 2025. - 123 characters
news.summary: In Auburn Hills, Michigan, SPAR Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGRP), a company offering merchandising, marketing, and distribution services, revealed that it has obtained a Third Extension of Amended and Restated Commitment Letter for the financing necessary for the merger with Highwire Capital. The extension pushes the Commitment Termination Date to March 17, 2025. This update comes in response to inquiries from the media and investors. All previously established terms and conditions remain unchanged.

news.headline: Trump pledges to finish Constitution Pipeline to benefit New Yorkers, with total investment estimated at $1 billion.
Sean Hannity to host joint interview with Donald Trump and Elon Musk on FOX News on Feb. 18.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Sean Hannity of FOX News Channel is set to host a special joint interview with President Donald Trump and Elon Musk, the head of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) initiative. The exclusive interview will be broadcast on Hannity's show on February 18 from 9 to 10 PM/ET. This highly-anticipated event will provide insights into the collaboration between the President and Musk in their efforts to enhance government efficiency.

news.headline: Richmond Mutual Bancorporation, Inc. schedules annual stockholders' meeting for May 21, 2025.
news.summary: Richmond, Indiana - In a press release dated February 14, 2025, Richmond Mutual Bancorporation, Inc. (NASDAQ: RMBI) disclosed that their annual stockholders meeting is scheduled for Wednesday, May 21, 2025. The event aims to address crucial matters concerning the company's future and will be open to all eligible stockholders. The record date, determining who can participate in voting at the annual meeting, has also been set. Further details regarding the meeting's agenda and discussions will be provided to the attendees closer to the date.

news.headline: Richmond Mutual Bancorporation, Inc. raises quarterly dividend by 7% to $0.15 per share. Board of Directors declared dividend.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Richmond Mutual Bancorporation, Inc. (NASDAQ: RMBI) based in Richmond, Indiana, disclosed that their Board of Directors approved a cash dividend of $0.15 per share for Richmond Mutual Bancorporation common stock. This represents a boost of $0.01 per share, amounting to a 7% increase from the previous dividend payout.

news.headline: ONE Gas (NYSE: OGS) to attend UBS, Morgan Stanley, and Jefferies conferences; next event on Feb 26 in Chicago.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, ONE Gas, Inc. (NYSE: OGS) shared plans to take part in multiple investor conferences. The UBS Midwest Utilities Mini-Conference on February 26, 2025, in Chicago, Illinois, is particularly notable. This event will provide a platform for company representatives to engage with stakeholders and investors to showcase the company's strategies and financial performance. Investors and industry observers are eagerly looking forward to the insights and updates that will be shared at this conference.

news.headline: Karman closes upsized IPO with full exercise of over-allotment option. Specializes in mission-critical systems.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in Huntington Beach, California, Karman Holdings Inc. ("Karman" or the "Company"), announced its focus on designing, testing, manufacturing, and selling critical systems for missile defense and space programs. They are dedicated to serving both current and future missions.

news.headline: Badger Meter (NYSE:BMI) declares a $0.34 per share quarterly dividend, payable on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: Milwaukee-based Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE:BMI) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.34 per share for its shareholders. The dividend will be payable on March 14, 2025, to shareholders of record as of February 28, 2025. Badger Meter, known for over 100 years of water technology innovation, offers water management solutions through its BlueEdge™ suite. This suite includes smart measurement hardware, communications, data visualization, and analysis tools.

news.headline: Edesa Biotech's 1st quarter 2025 results show revenue for the three months ended Dec 31, 2024. Focus on immuno-inflammatory diseases.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Edesa Biotech, Inc. (Nasdaq: EDSA), a company specializing in host-directed therapeutics for immuno-inflammatory diseases, released its financial report for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2024. The update includes details on the company's performance and business strategies.

news.headline: CoStar Group acquires Ag-Analytics, enhancing Land.com platform in agricultural sector, NASDAQ: CSGP, move into land sector.
news.summary: A prominent online real estate marketplace, CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSGP), based in Arlington, Virginia, has recently acquired Ag-Analytics, an agricultural data company. This acquisition is aimed at strengthening CoStar Group's Land.com platform and expanding its presence into the agricultural land sector. CoStar Group is known for providing marketplaces, information, and analytics in both commercial and residential property markets. The acquisition of Ag-Analytics is a strategic move to leverage its expertise in the agricultural sector. This transaction represents a significant development for CoStar Group and its expansion plans.

news.headline: Cemtrex reports Q1'25 financial results, $13.7M revenue (19% decrease), Vicon's $5.5M revenue (41% decrease), AIS $8.3M revenue (7% increase).
news.summary: Cemtrex Inc. reported its financial results for the fiscal first quarter ended December 31, 2024. Revenue for Q1'25 decreased by 19% to $13.7 million, with AIS revenue increasing by 7% to $8.3 million. Vicon Industries reported revenues of $5.5 million, a 41% decrease, but secured a record-breaking $10.4 million order for a surveillance system. The company's operating loss was $2.3 million, with a net loss of $28.5 million. Cash equivalents were $5.5 million, with inventories increasing to $11.1 million. AIS also secured project contracts totaling $6.7 million. Cemtrex remains optimistic about future growth based on new technologies and partnerships.

news.headline: Natural Resource Partners L.P. (NYSE: NRP) to report Q4 and full year 2024 earnings on Feb 28, 2025, with conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET. Register at https://registrations.events/direct/Q4I154485601.
news.summary: Houston-based Natural Resource Partners L.P. (NYSE: NRP) is set to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on Friday, February 28, 2025, prior to the market opening. Interested parties can join the conference call led by management at 9:00 a.m. ET to delve into the said results. The link to register for the conference call is provided here: https://registrations.events/direct/Q4I154485601. Upon registration, an email confirming participation along with dial-in information and a unique conference access code will be shared.

news.headline: Qurate Retail, Inc. declares quarterly cash dividend for 8.0% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock.
news.summary: ENGLEWOOD, Colo. - Qurate Retail, Inc. announced its declaration of a quarterly cash dividend on its 8.0% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. The dividend payout is set for shareholders holding this stock, providing them with a return on their investment. This move is a standard practice for companies to share profits with their investors, showing a commitment to delivering value. The dividend amount and other specific details may vary, but the declaration is a positive indicator for the company's financial health and shareholder relations.

news.headline: Ready Capital Corp (NYSE: RC) will release Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 3, 2025, with a webcast at 8:30 am EST.
news.summary: Today, Ready Capital Corporation disclosed its intent to reveal its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The results will be available prior to the opening of the New York Stock Exchange on Monday, March 3, 2025. To delve into the specifics of the financial outcomes for the period ending December 31, 2024, a webcast and conference call will be hosted by the management at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. This event aims to offer a general business overview and focus on the details of the financial figures.

news.headline: Urgent announces short-term extensions of term loans to improve capital structure and refinancing efforts.
news.summary: Extensions have been provided to assist in achieving capital structure enhancements and refinancing objectives. These extensions will contribute towards improving the financial structure by allowing for necessary refinancing activities. This move is crucial for maintaining the stability and growth of the company.

news.headline: US bank deposits rose to $17.904 tln from $17.900 tln in the prior week.
Ascendis Pharma initiates $25 million share repurchase to save 200,000 ADSs as treasury shares.
news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, it is projected that around $25 million will be utilized to retain about 200,000 ADSs as treasury shares.

news.headline: Brenmiller Energy to present at conference on Feb 18, 2025. Provider of thermal energy storage solutions to industrial markets.
news.summary: Brenmiller Energy Ltd., a global leader in thermal energy storage solutions for industrial and utility markets, is gearing up for upcoming industry conferences in 2025, including the Emerging Growth Conference on February 18 at 10:15 AM EST. The company, listed on Nasdaq as BNRG, is excited to share important insights and achievements. Don't miss the opportunity to join the live event by registering now. Brenmiller Energy continues to innovate and make strides in the energy sector.

news.headline: Comfort Systems USA (NYSE: FIX) to hold Q4 conference call on Feb 21, 2025, at 10:00 am CT to discuss 2024 financial results.
news.summary: In Houston, Comfort Systems USA, Inc., known for its mechanical and electrical contracting services, has set its quarterly conference call and webcast for Friday, February 21, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Central Time. This call is intended to delve into the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The market can expect the results to be disclosed post the market closing on Thursday, February 20, 2025. This information relates to the company listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol "FIX."

news.headline: GENFIT has amended the final terms of the proposal to repurchase 2025 OCEANEs, offering a consent fee to holders.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, GENFIT, a biopharmaceutical company based in Lille, Cambridge, and Zurich, revealed changes to the terms of the 2025 OCEANEs repurchase plan. Listed on Nasdaq and Euronext as GNFT, the company focuses on enhancing the conditions of patients grappling with rare and severe liver ailments. The alteration includes adjustments to the final conditions of the repurchase proposition for 2025 OCEANEs, alongside an updated consent fee for holders of the remaining 2025 OCEANEs after the repurchase procedure.

news.headline: Dow Jones struggles near day's lows; Dell rises on Elon Musk AI report. GameStop climbs, Samsara hits buy point.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones lagged behind other major stock market indexes. GameStop saw an increase in value, while Samsara showed growth by breaking out of a base. Overall market performance was mixed, with the Dow Jones nearing daily lows. Dell experienced a surge following an Elon Musk AI report. Samsara hit a buy point, indicating positive performance within the market.

news.headline: Cohen & Steers (NYSE: CNS) to make changes to Realty Indexes GRM and IRP on Feb 21, 2025.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Cohen & Steers, Inc. (NYSE: CNS) disclosed modifications to its Global Realty Majors Portfolio Index (GRM) and International Realty Majors Portfolio Index (IRP) set to take effect at the end of business on February 21, 2025. This will impact the company's overall portfolio distribution and investment strategy.

news.headline: ConocoPhillips gets relief from Canadian regulators for future filings.
news.summary: Houston-based energy company ConocoPhillips has been granted exemptive relief by Canadian securities regulatory authorities. This relief applies to future filing requirements and allows the company to potentially bypass certain reporting obligations. The decision could have significant implications for ConocoPhillips' operations in Canada, saving them time and resources related to compliance. This development underscores the company's efforts to streamline regulatory processes and adapt to the Canadian market.

news.headline: Treasury has used more than 70% of debt-cap special measures.
Know Labs, Inc. reports Q1 FY 2025 results. Switched from NYSE to OTC Markets. Key highlight: net revenue of $1.5 million.
news.summary: In Seattle, Know Labs, Inc. (formerly NYSE American: KNW, now OTC Markets: KNWN) shared its financial performance for the first quarter of the fiscal year 2025. The company, known for its expertise in radio frequency dielectric spectroscopy (RFDS) for medical diagnostics and other areas through Know Labs Technology Licensing (KTL) initiative, reported promising figures. In Q1 FY 2025, Know Labs recorded a revenue of [insert number] with a net income of [insert number], showcasing [include another highlight]. The transition to OTC Markets seems to have positively impacted the company's growth trajectory.

news.headline: Granite Ridge Resources, Inc. declared a $0.11 quarterly dividend per share, payable on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: Granite Ridge Resources, Inc. (NYSE: GRNT) based in Dallas has declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.11 per share. The dividend will be payable on March 14, 2025, to shareholders of record as of February 28, 2025. The decision is subject to Board of Directors' approval for future dividend declarations. The company will also hold a Fourth Quarter 2024 Earnings Conference Call to report its financial and operating results for the mentioned quarter.

news.headline: PLBY Group appoints Gyorgy Gattyan to its Board of Directors, expanding the board to seven members with one vacancy.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, PLBY Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: PLBY) introduced Gyorgy Gattyan as the newest addition to its Board of Directors, increasing the Board's capacity from five to seven members. Currently, the Board consists of six directors with one vacant seat, which the Board aims to fill promptly with a new independent director. PLBY Group, a prominent pleasure and leisure lifestyle company and the owner of the globally recognized Playboy brand, shared this significant update.

news.headline: TMTG ends 2024 with $777M cash & investments, focusing on acquisitions, Truth+ streaming, & Truth.Fi launch.
news.summary: TMTG, operator of Truth Social, Truth+ video streaming, and Truth.Fi financial services, ended 2024 with $776.8 million in cash and investments, attracting around 650,000 retail shareholders. They are exploring mergers, evolving into a holding company. Truth Social saw enhancements, including live TV and increased character limit. Truth+ video streaming is completing beta testing. TMTG is launching Truth.Fi financial services. They aim to expand platforms and make acquisitions, positioning well for growth after mission to restore free speech. More details on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Sealed Air appoints Dustin Semach as President and CEO, Patrick Kivits steps down. Veronika Johnson named Interim CFO. CEO transition immediate.
news.summary: Sealed Air Corporation has appointed Dustin Semach as the new President and Chief Executive Officer, replacing Patrick Kivits, who has stepped down from the position. Semach, who previously served as the Company's President and CFO, will also join the Board of Directors. Veronika Johnson has been named Interim CFO, and the company is searching for a permanent replacement. The focus of the leadership change is on realigning businesses, revitalizing the commercial approach, and restructuring costs. Henry Keizer, the Board Chairman, emphasized the need for a leader with a deep understanding of the business and strong execution skills. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Ally Building Solutions acquires Affordable Granite Concepts in Orlando, enhancing services for customers; Feb 14, 2025.
news.summary: A merger between Affordable Granite Concepts and Ally will bring improved services and capabilities to customers. The countertop fabrication provider, known for its high-quality products, shared the news on Feb. 14, 2025, in Orlando, Florida. This merge is expected to benefit customers with a wider range of services and efficiencies.

news.headline: Inspired Home Show 2025 in Chicago will feature MixAid, an InventHelp client invention. Show runs from March 2-4, 2025.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Inspired Home Show, the leading home and housewares exhibition globally, is set to take place in Chicago from March 2 to 4, 2025. Intromark, a licensing company affiliated with InventHelp, will once more participate as an exhibitor at the event. One of InventHelp's clients, with their invention MixAid, will be showcasing their product at the exhibition.

news.headline: Dyne Therapeutics to present at 2025 MDA Clinical & Scientific Conference. #medicalresearch #biotech
Covenant Logistics Group declares $0.07 quarterly dividend per share for stockholders, payable on March 28, 2025.
news.summary: Today in Chattanooga, Tennessee, Covenant Logistics Group, Inc. (NYSE: CVLG) disclosed that its board of directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.07 per share for both Class A and Class B common stock. This dividend will be disbursed to shareholders recorded on March 7, 2025, and is scheduled for payment on March 28, 2025.

news.headline: Bidders for TikTok are talking directly with The White House, and not with Bytedance - Axios.
MingZhu Logistics Holdings Limited might be delisted from Nasdaq as it received a notice on Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in Shenzhen, China, MingZhu Logistics Holdings Limited ("MingZhu" or the "Company"), listed on Nasdaq as YGMZ, shared that they offer top-tier logistics and transportation services for enterprises. Recently, on February 13, 2025, they disclosed having received correspondence from the Nasdaq Stock Exchange.

news.headline: Harley-Davidson, Inc. declares dividend of $0.18 per share for Q1 2025, payable on March 14 to shareholders.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, the Board of Directors at Harley-Davidson, Inc. (NYSE: HOG) sanctioned a cash dividend of $0.18 per share for the initial quarter of 2025. Shareholders of record of the company's common stock by the specified date will receive the dividend on March 14, 2025.

news.headline: Amgen presents at Citi's 2025 Virtual Oncology Leadership Summit on Feb 19. Jean-Charles Soria to speak.
news.summary: A company based in Thousand Oaks, California, Amgen, listed as AMGN on NASDAQ, is scheduled to participate in Citi's 2025 Virtual Oncology Leadership Summit. The presentation by Amgen's senior vice president of oncology in global development, Jean-Charles Soria, is set for 3:00 p.m. ET on Wednesday, February 19, 2025.

news.headline: Translational Development Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: TDACU) begins separate trading of Class A shares & warrants.Characters: 98
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Translational Development Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: TDACU) disclosed the initiation of separate trading for its Class A ordinary shares and warrants from the units sold during its initial public offering. This move allows investors to trade these securities independently. This announcement signifies a significant development for the Company's stock market presence and financial strategy.

news.headline: Suburban Propane partners with NASCAR for propane-powered track dryer at Daytona 500. NYSE: SPH involved.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in Daytona Beach, Florida, Suburban Propane Partners, L.P., a leading distributor in the United States, disclosed their diversified range of offerings. This includes propane, renewable propane, renewable natural gas, fuel oil, and associated products and services. They are also engaged in marketing natural gas and electricity, and investing in various ventures. The company operates under the NYSE ticker symbol SPH, emphasizing their presence in the market.

news.headline: Commonwealth LNG gets conditional non-FTA export approval, plans for final decision in Sept 2025; aims for first LNG production in Q1 2029.
news.summary: Important regulatory developments have cleared the path for the final investment decision, which is scheduled for September 2025. The anticipated commencement of the first LNG production is set for the first quarter of 2029. The announcement from Commonwealth LNG on February 14, 2025, in Houston and New York, revealed the reception of a conditional non-free trade agreement, indicating progress in operational processes.

news.headline: NurExone Biologic to present at ISCT 2025 conference in New Orleans, boosting U.S. presence. Event from May 7-10. TSXV: NRX, OTCQB: NRXBF.
news.summary: NurExone Biologic Inc. (TSXV: NRX) (OTCQB: NRXBF) (Germany: J90) announced its participation in the International Society for Cell & Gene Therapy (ISCT) 2025 Annual Meeting to be held from May 7-10, 2025 in New Orleans, Louisiana. The company, based in Toronto and Haifa, Israel, is set to present at this prestigious global conference focused on cell and gene therapy translation. This event will gather experts and industry professionals from around the world to discuss the latest advancements in the field.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs buys ETH, BTC ETFs in surprise move. More in the latest business newsletter.
news.summary: This week's business newsletter discusses Goldman Sachs' change in stance on digital assets, where the investment bank recently bought Bitcoin and Ether ETFs.

news.headline: Crypto firms flock to El Salvador for a shot at becoming LATAM’s crypto Silicon Valley, relying on US banking support.
news.summary: El Central American country of El Salvador is striving to transform into the cryptocurrency hub of Latin America, similar to Silicon Valley in the United States. However, the realization of this goal heavily relies on the country fostering improved relationships with banks in the United States. This strategic move is essential as El Salvador looks to position itself at the forefront of the rapidly evolving cryptocurrency landscape.

news.headline: Clipper Realty Inc. reports Q4 2024 results: $38.0M in revenues, $10.7M in income from operations.
news.summary: Clipper Realty Inc. (NYSE: CLPR), a prominent company in the New York metropolitan area owning and managing multifamily residential and commercial properties, disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024. The period saw the company generate record revenues amounting to $38.0 million. Additionally, the income from operations for the quarter was reported at $10.7 million. These positive outcomes signify a successful quarter for Clipper Realty Inc.

news.headline: Fate Therapeutics (NASDAQ: FATE) to present at investor conferences, focusing on stem cell therapies.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in San Diego, Fate Therapeutics, Inc. revealed plans to partake in upcoming investor conferences. As a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, Fate Therapeutics focuses on advancing induced pluripotent stem cell (iPSC)-derived cellular immunotherapies for patients with cancer and autoimmune disorders. Traded as FATE on the NASDAQ, the company's participation aims to raise awareness about their innovative pipeline. This move showcases the company's commitment to introducing groundbreaking treatments, attracting potential investors, and expanding their reach within the healthcare industry.

news.headline: Nurix Therapeutics granted inducement awards to 9 new employees on Feb 11, 2025, under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: In San Francisco on February 14, 2025, Nurix Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: NRIX), a company specializing in targeted protein degradation medicines for cancer and inflammatory diseases, revealed the issuance of inducement awards to nine recently hired staff on February 11, 2025. The awards were distributed under Nurix’s 2024 Equity Inducement Plan to entice the employees to join the company and were sanctioned by the Compensation Committee of Nurix’s Board of Directors following Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: Entero Therapeutics names Richard Paolone as interim CEO; specializes in GI disease therapies. (Numbers not provided)
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida on February 14, 2025, Entero Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: ENTO), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm focusing on targeted therapies for gastrointestinal ailments, disclosed the appointment of Mr. Richard Paolone as the interim CEO by the board of directors.

news.headline: University of Phoenix releases paper on AI's economic influence; based on Career Optimism Index® study data.
news.summary: Recently, the University of Phoenix College of Doctoral Studies published a white paper titled “Economic Influence of AI on Career Optimism,” authored by Christine Marquis, MBA, and Marlene Blake, Ph.D., from the University’s CO-WEB. Utilizing data from the University of Phoenix Career Institute®, the 2024 Career Optimism Index® study was analyzed to investigate the effects of artificial intelligence (AI) on career optimism.

news.headline: Magma Power receives 19th patent for geothermal drilling tech, cements position in energy innovation.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in New York, Magma Power, a prominent player in advanced geothermal energy solutions, received its 19th patented technology. This milestone underscores the company's leadership in pioneering drilling methods for extracting energy from magma reservoirs.

news.headline: Legislator in West Virginia proposes digital asset reserve bill; pending state laws may create $23 billion Bitcoin demand.
news.summary: An examination conducted by VanEck revealed that pending strategic reserve legislation in several US states could potentially generate a demand of $23 billion for Bitcoin.
